description_long: This kiosk is a modern, open-plan commercial structure designed for customer interaction and product display. The front features a wide counter area with high stools, flanked by large printed graphics and branding, including the 'Sabco' logo and images of smiling faces. The interior is divided into distinct zones, including a central service counter, side seating areas, and product shelving along the back wall. The color palette is dominated by white, brown, and green panels, with accents of blue and gray, giving it a clean and inviting appearance. The roof is flat and boxy, with a raised central section that may serve as a lightbox or signage holder. Multiple printed and digital signs are integrated into the structure, and the open entryway allows easy access for customers.
description: A modern, open commercial kiosk with branded signage, seating areas, and a flat roof, featuring white, brown, and green panels. The structure is designed for customer interaction and product display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main counter, high stools, large printed graphics, and prominent branding.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the side seating area, product shelving, and the green side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back wall with shelving, central signage, and the raised roof section.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the entryway, side panels, and the boxy roof structure.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs and banners with branding and product information, including a large logo on the front left, a banner above the main counter, and printed graphics on side panels.
attribute_door_configuration: Single large open entryway at the front, no visible doors.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a raised central box section, likely for signage or lighting, constructed from solid panels.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial with minimalist and functional design elements.
